LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF FAILS TO PLEAD FACTS DEMONSTRATING AN INABILITY TO DISCOVER HIS CLAIM PRIOR TO THE RUNNING OF THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS. ON ITS FACE, THE DEED GIVES NOTICE THAT THE PROPERTY WAS DEEDED TO BOTH PLAINTIFF AND HIS FORMER WIFE. THE CLAIM ALSO IS BARRED BY COLLATERAL ESTOPPEL GIVEN THE FINDINGS OF THE FLORIDA COURT. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600

MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT.
